name: IntelliFold 2
description: Predicts the 3D structure of proteins, RNA, DNA, and small molecules with support for modified residues and covalent ligands. Outperforms AlphaFold 3 on FoldBench with 54.5% antibody-antigen and 66.7% protein-ligand success rates (vs AF3's 47.9% and 64.9%). Three model variants: v2 (most accurate, 0.89 protein monomer LDDT), v2-flash (fast), and v1.
capabilities: Predicts the 3D structure of proteins, RNA, DNA, and small molecules with support for modified residues and covalent ligands
Outperforms AlphaFold 3 on FoldBench with 54.5% antibody-antigen and 66.7% protein-ligand success rates (vs AF3's 47.9% and 64.9%)
Three model variants: v2 (most accurate, 0.89 protein monomer LDDT), v2-flash (fast), and v1

sequences.description: Array of entity objects. Each entity has a type (protein, rna, dna, or ligand) and corresponding sequence or SMILES.

sequence.description: Amino acid sequence for protein, nucleotide sequence for RNA/DNA

modelVariant.description: Model variant to use. v2 is most accurate (0.89 protein monomer LDDT), v2-flash is fast, v1 is the original.

numSamples.description: Number of structure predictions to return
